task: Produce a compact, auditable evidence packet and final recommendation for an options parity quote-set quality hold decision using only the embedded packet. Embedded packet (three records): R1: call_mid=23, put_mid=43, strike=6; R2: call_mid=32, put_mid=39, strike=9; R3: call_mid=18, put_mid=54, strike=5. Remediation options: O1: change call_mid by -12% cost=68,000; O2: change put_mid by -18% cost=88,400; O3: change strike by -25% cost=49,600; max_budget=112,800. Rules/constraints: put-call parity residual > 0.75 => stale quote; calls should decline with strike (monotonicity check); missing values cannot be imputed; use only the embedded packet for all calculations. Required deliverables: a row-level evidence table and documented decision logic that classifies each record (and overall set) into pass, warning, failure, or needs_review. Deliverables to produce: options_parity_2.xlsx and expert_memo.md. Do not invent inputs; where items are ambiguous or missing, mark them as needs_review.
